name: Chocolate
description: All-natural chocolate ice cream made with rich, dark cocoa and a touch of fleur de sel sea salt for a deep, balanced flavor.

name: Vanilla
description: All-natural vanilla ice cream offering a smooth, rich flavor with no artificial additives or preservatives.

name: Strawberry
shortDescription: Sweet strawberry ice cream made with fresh berries
description: All-natural ice cream blended with fresh, locally grown strawberries picked at peak ripeness.

name: Cherry Vanilla
shortDescription: Creamy vanilla ice cream with juicy cherries
description: All-natural ice cream blended with ripe, juicy cherries and smooth vanilla for a perfectly balanced flavor.

name: Butter Pecan
description: All-natural Non-Dairy ice cream blended with roasted, buttery pecans for a rich, smooth flavor with a satisfying crunch.

name: Mint Chocolate Chip
shortDescription: Cool mint ice cream with chocolate chips
description: All-natural ice cream blended with cool mint and rich chocolate chips for a refreshing, smooth flavor with bits of chocolate in every bite.

name: Cookie Dough
shortDescription: Creamy ice cream with chunks of cookie dough
description: Rich, creamy ice cream packed with chunks of fresh home-baked cookie dough. Gluten-free and egg-free.
